title: austrostipa campylachne
intro: Austrostipa campylachne, also known as the spear grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Austrostipa campylachne include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
